findings.description: Parse the combined location string into structured fields: bedrooms, bathrooms, and property type. Example from Sample 2 suggests this is possible ('3 habitaciones 1 baño - Casa').
Extract the specific property type or listing category (e.g., 'Casa', 'Apartment') from the location string for better filtering.
If available, extract precise geographical coordinates (latitude/longitude) instead of relying solely on the descriptive location string.
